abilities.description: Put two +1/+1 counters on up to one target creature.
Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature card. Put that card into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

effect.description: Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature card. Put that card into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.
effect.name: DigUntil

abilities.description: Put X +1/+1 counters on target creature, where X is your life total. That creature gains trample until end of turn.
